sustainabilityContext.summary: Subsidies lower financial barriers and reduce risk so businesses and investors can choose efficient equipment and sustainable technologies — especially where upfront cost is high and payback is long.
sustainabilityContext.innovationNote: Innovation is central to the climate transition: governments, research, and companies cooperate, and subsidies help de-risk demonstration and rollout of new applications across energy, circular economy, and mobility.

newsToMedia.reason: News, policy updates, and how new schemes or products relate to sustainability trends

productGrantExample.narrative: When you browse a specific product — for example an efficient commercial dishwasher — matched grants may appear as tax relief, purchase subsidies, or regional programmes. Amounts and eligibility depend on your profile region (Netherlands or UK).

scopeNotes.applyHelp: deferred — no apply-for-me flow in chat yet

roleSummaryFirstPerson: Hi — I'm **Andrieus**, your grants and schemes specialist. I match funding programmes to your region and equipment upgrades so you see what's worth applying for before you commit capex.
